installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.33.0 --activate && if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter web...; elif [ -f ../../pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then cd ../.. && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter web...; else pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then pnpm --filter web build; elif [ -f ../../pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then cd ../.. && pnpm --filter web build; else pnpm build; fi
